channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Israel launches new strikes at Iran and Lebanon, as US says it has hit 16 Iranian mine-laying ships - BBC
item.description:
1. Israel launches new strikes at Iran and Lebanon, as US says it has hit 16 Iranian mine-laying ships  BBC
  2. What we know on the 12th day of the US and Israel’s war with Iran  CNN
  3. Iran war live: Tehran says US, Israel have hit nearly 10,000 civilian sites  Al Jazeera
  4. WATCH: White House holds briefing as U.S. announces 'most intense' day of strikes on Iran  PBS
  5. Combatants in Mideast war trade more air strikes as Iran clamps down on dissent  Reuters

item.description:

item.title: Trump calls war in Iran 'a little excursion ... to get rid of some evil,' predicting end to hostilities soon - Fortune
item.description:
1. Trump calls war in Iran 'a little excursion ... to get rid of some evil,' predicting end to hostilities soon  Fortune

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: EU chief: Phasing out nuclear power was 'strategic mistake' - dw.com
item.description:
1. EU chief: Phasing out nuclear power was 'strategic mistake'  dw.com
  2. Reducing Europe's nuclear energy sector was 'strategic mistake', EU chief says  Reuters
  3. Today we are presenting a new European strategy for Small Modular Reactors. Our goal is simple. We want this new technology to be operational in Europe by the early 2030s. And to back this we will create a €200M guarantee, to support private investment i  x.com
  4. Brussels backs mini-nuclear power plants to secure low-carbon power  Euronews.com
  5. EU Made a ‘Mistake’ in Phasing Out Nuclear, Von Der Leyen Says  Bloomberg
